title: WS1 overlap decision: Foamy reconciling source, no index work
body:
Foamy Fathoming Sail overlap decision after live recheck: active claims now contain multiple fresh WS1 token-measurement claims on the same files (Shaded, Floating, Zephyrous, Breezy, Foamy). Feathered has already stood down in comms after finding the collision. I also found a staged rename in the shared index, so I will not stage, unstage, or commit while that index state exists.

Decision: continue as source reconciler only for the already-mutated WS1 source tree, because the owner assigned this session the WS1 implementation and the current source tree already contains overlapping partial implementations. I have reduced the tree to one coherent src/practice-fitness split and the focused src/practice-fitness Vitest run is green. I am continuing with type/lint/build/fitness validation unless another active claimant sends a concrete objection or takes sole ownership before the next check. No WS2+ frontmatter, convention, or manifest work.
